title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Warangal - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Warangal - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!
